name: Arthur

skills.name: Holy Vanguard
skills.description: Invokes the protection of the divine light to recover Health continuously. If Movement Speed is impaired, the Health restored is doubled.

skills.name: Valiant Charge
skills.description: Enhances the next Basic Attack into a dash, dealing extra damage and silencing enemies.

skills.name: Whirling Strike
skills.description: Deals damage over time to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Might of Excalibur
skills.description: Jumps to the target enemy hero to deal damage. Launches all heroes within range.

tips: Arthur is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.5% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Fortitude → Axe of Torment → Frostscar's Embrace → Glacial Buckler → Eye of the Phoenix → Cuirass of Savagery.
Run Fate for stats that match Arthur's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Valiant Charge → Whirling Strike → Might of Excalibur → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Arthur excels into Han Xin, Arke. Avoid blind picking into Xiang Yu, Lady Sun without team peel.
Arthur is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Arthur.

faqs.question: Is Arthur good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Arthur is Tier S Tank with 50.5% win rate, 1.5% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Arthur build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, Glacial Buckler, Eye of the Phoenix, Cuirass of Savagery. Run Fate arcana with Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Arthur?
faqs.answer: Pick Xiang Yu, Lady Sun into Arthur. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Arthur completes core items. Arthur struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Arthur counter?
faqs.answer: Arthur is strong into Han Xin, Arke according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Arthur when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Arthur good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Arthur is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Arthur.

faqs.question: What lane should Arthur play?
faqs.answer: Arthur is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Fighter, Tank). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Arthur?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Arthur or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Arthur vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Arthur when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Arthur?
faqs.answer: Optional ban when enemy spams Tank; 1.5% pick rate but only 0.1% ban rate.
